intentSynonyms: look up a property in booking
fetch a single property in booking
view one specific property in booking
get property details by name and location in booking
description: Get detailed information about a specific property on Booking.com by searching for it. Provide the property name and city to find it, along with check-in/check-out dates for pricing.

property_name.description: Property name or partial name to search for

city.description: City where the property is located

checkin.description: Check-in date in YYYY-MM-DD format (for pricing)

checkout.description: Check-out date in YYYY-MM-DD format (for pricing)
